events.rule.retrypolicy.MaximumEventAgeI.Description: The maximum amount of time, in seconds, to continue to make retry attempts.

events.rule.retrypolicy.MaximumRetryAtte.Description: The maximum number of retry attempts to make before the request fails. Retry attempts continue until either the maximum number of attempts is made or until the duration of the `MaximumEventAgeInSeconds` is met.
